name: AeDebug — Just-In-Time Debugger
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: Configures the Just-In-Time (JIT) debugger that launches when any process crashes. AeDebug specifies the debugger binary and command line; .NETFramework configures the managed code equivalent.
forensic_value: Replacing the JIT debugger with a malicious binary causes it to execute with the crashing process's privileges every time any application crashes — stealthy persistence triggered by normal crash events.
